meta.description: Full frontend-to-backend handoff for StellarSplit — a decentralized group expense splitting dApp on Stellar blockchain.

project.name: StellarSplit
project.description: Decentralized group expense splitting dApp on Stellar blockchain. Frontend uses React+TypeScript+Freighter wallet. Backend is NestJS+PostgreSQL+Redis. Auth is via Stellar wallet signature (SIWS).
project.frontendStack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Freighter Wallet, Soroban SDK
project.backendStackPreference: NestJS 10, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, Redis + BullMQ, Passport JWT, S3-compatible storage, Railway deployment

pages.name: Landing
pages.purpose: Connect Freighter wallet or enter demo mode. Entry point to the dApp.
emptyStates: Wallet not connected — prompt to install Freighter

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.purpose: User's groups list. Create new group. Search groups.
emptyStates: No groups yet — prompt to create first group

pages.name: GroupDetail
pages.purpose: Group detail view with tabs: Expenses, Balances, Settle, Gallery, DeFi, Recurring, Social, Governance, Security.
errorStates: Not a member of this group

pages.name: JoinGroup
pages.purpose: Join a group via invite link. Adds current wallet address as a member.

pages.name: ReputationDashboard
pages.purpose: User reputation dashboard — payment history, score, badges.

forms.name: ConnectWalletForm
forms.note: Freighter wallet signs a SIWS challenge. No password. Wallet address = identity.

validation.note: Must be a valid Stellar public key (G...)

fields.name: signature
fields.label: Wallet Signature
fields.description: SIWS signature produced by Freighter over the challenge nonce

forms.successBehavior: Redirect to /dashboard with JWT stored in localStorage
forms.errorBehavior: Show error toast; stay on Landing

fields.name: members
fields.label: Initial Members
fields.description: Stellar wallet addresses to add as initial members

validation.note: Each entry must be a valid Stellar public key

fields.name: paidBy
fields.label: Paid By
fields.description: Wallet address of member who paid

fields.name: splits
fields.label: Split Details
fields.description: Array of {walletAddress, amount} for custom/percentage splits. Omit for equal split.
fields.note: Required when splitType is custom or percentage

forms.name: SettleGroupForm

fields.name: txHash
fields.label: Transaction Hash
fields.description: Stellar transaction hash from Freighter-signed settlement

forms.successBehavior: Mark group as settled; refresh settlements history

forms.name: CreateRecurringForm

fields.name: members
fields.label: Split Between
fields.description: Wallet addresses to split among; defaults to all group members

forms.successBehavior: Add to recurring list; schedule next run

actions.name: CancelExpense
actions.description: Cancel an active expense — soft-delete, recalculate balances
actions.confirmationMessage: Cancel this expense? Balances will be recalculated.

actions.name: LeaveGroup
actions.confirmationMessage: Leave this group? You cannot rejoin without a new invite.

actions.name: ViewReputation
actions.description: Fetch user reputation score, badges, payment history

authFlows.name: SIWS Wallet Authentication
authFlows.notes: Sign In With Stellar (SIWS). Step 1: GET /auth/challenge returns a nonce. Step 2: Frontend signs nonce with Freighter. Step 3: POST /auth/verify with walletAddress + signature + nonce. Backend verifies Ed25519 signature using @stellar/stellar-sdk. On success, issues JWT (access token 15m + refresh token 7d). No passwords.

authFlows.name: JWT Refresh
authFlows.notes: Refresh access token using the refresh token stored in HttpOnly cookie.

authFlows.name: Logout
authFlows.notes: Revokes refresh token; clears HttpOnly cookie.

authFlows.name: Group Member RBAC
authFlows.notes: Users are either group members or non-members. Group creator has elevated permissions (delete group, manage members). Guardians have recovery permissions.

uploads.name: ReceiptUpload
uploads.storageHint: S3-compatible (Cloudflare R2 or AWS S3). Path: receipts/{groupId}/{expenseId}/{uuid}.{ext}
uploads.notes: Uploaded via multipart/form-data. Sharp resizes to max 1920px. Returns signed URL. Receipt URL stored on Expense entity.

externalTriggers.name: StellarHorizonTxMonitor
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Polls Horizon for tx confirmation; updates settlement status; triggers reputation update
externalTriggers.notes: BullMQ job with exponential backoff retry (max 10 attempts). Timeout 30s per attempt. Circuit breaker pattern: after 5 consecutive failures, pause queue for 60s.

externalTriggers.name: RecurringExpenseScheduler
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Auto-creates expense when nextDue is reached; advances nextDue by frequency interval
externalTriggers.notes: BullMQ repeatable jobs. Cron checks every minute. On failure: skip cycle, log, notify group creator.

externalTriggers.name: NotificationDispatch
externalTriggers.providerHint: Web Push API / Discord webhook / Slack webhook
externalTriggers.triggerSource: Expense create/cancel, settlement, member join/leave, recurring trigger
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Sends push notification or webhook to configured channels
externalTriggers.notes: BullMQ queue with retry=3. Payload is JSON. Discord/Slack webhooks verified via shared secret in env. Web push uses VAPID keys.

externalTriggers.name: XLMPriceFeed
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Returns current XLM/USD price for display. Cached in Redis for 60s.
externalTriggers.notes: Rate limit: CoinGecko free tier = 30 calls/min. Timeout 5s. On failure: serve cached value; if cache stale >5min, show 'price unavailable'.

externalTriggers.name: AnalyticsEventIngestion
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Persists analytics event for usage tracking
externalTriggers.notes: Fire-and-forget. Existing server.js /analytics endpoint migrated into NestJS module.

externalTriggers.name: OGImageGeneration
externalTriggers.expectedOutcome: Generates Open Graph image for group share cards
externalTriggers.notes: Migrated from existing server.js. Cached in S3/R2.

assumptions: Auth: SIWS (Sign In With Stellar) uses Ed25519 signature verification via @stellar/stellar-sdk. No passwords are stored. Wallet address is the user identifier.
CORS: CORS is configured to allow only the frontend origin (env var FRONTEND_URL). Credentials mode enabled for HttpOnly refresh-token cookie.
JWT: Access token TTL is 15 minutes. Refresh token TTL is 7 days, stored in HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookie. Refresh tokens are stored hashed in Redis for revocation.
Rate limiting: /auth/challenge and /auth/verify are rate-limited to 10 req/min per IP using throttler. All public endpoints are rate-limited to 60 req/min per IP.

Data classification: walletAddress is a public-key identifier, not PII in the traditional sense. No email, phone, or national ID is collected. No financial card data. Data classification tier: Internal.

Structured logging: Pino logger is used throughout. No console.log in service/controller files. All log lines include correlationId (X-Request-ID), walletAddress (where applicable), route, and statusCode.
Health checks: GET /health/live and GET /health/ready endpoints are defined in HealthModule. Railway health check path is /health/live.

File upload security: MIME type validation enforced by Multer (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp only). Max 10MB. Files stored in S3-compatible bucket with signed URLs (expiry 1h). Never publicly exposed.

Idempotency: Settlement creation is idempotent on txHash — duplicate txHash returns 200 with existing record instead of 409. Expense creation is not idempotent (deliberate — users may add same expense twice by mistake and cancel manually).

Resilience: External service calls (Stellar Horizon, CoinGecko) have timeouts (5-30s), retry with exponential backoff, and circuit breaker. Redis cache is used to reduce blast radius of external API failures.

Background jobs: BullMQ is used for all async work. Jobs have configurable retry counts and dead-letter queue. Worker is co-located with API in monolith mode for Railway deploy but architected for extraction.
Notifications: Webhook endpoints for Discord/Slack verify signature via HMAC-SHA256 shared secret. Web push uses VAPID. All notification delivery is async via BullMQ.
Reputation: Score is computed server-side based on settlement history, on-time payments, and group participation. Not user-editable.
Multi-tenancy: Groups are the primary isolation boundary. Users belong to multiple groups. No workspace/org concept.
Soroban: Smart contract interactions are handled by StellarService adapter. Frontend initiates Soroban calls; backend only records on-chain results via Horizon monitoring.
Observability: Sentry DSN and LOG_LEVEL are env-var-backed. Health endpoint included. Metrics via Prometheus-compatible /metrics endpoint (optional).
Pagination: All list endpoints support cursor-based pagination (cursor, limit params). Default limit=20, max=100.
No raw card storage: No credit/debit card data is collected or stored at any point. Out of PCI scope.

Field-level encryption: No traditional PII fields (email, phone, address, national ID) are collected. walletAddress is a Stellar public key — a non-sensitive public identifier. No field-level AES encryption is required. Data classification tier: Internal (public-key identifiers only).
